name: journal
description: BuJo-style daily journaling. Creates today's entry from a Rapid-Logging template using Carroll's four-signifier vocabulary (note dash, action dot, event circle, mood equals) and dot-state-marker transformations (✕ complete / → migrated / » exported / ~~•~~ dropped). Default mode is silent capture; opt-in coaching walks the user through Carroll's daily reflection ritual (carry-forward / mark-complete / migrate / delegate / drop). Capture-layer only — manual migration per BuJo discipline.
